---
title: "GLMM_testing"
format: html
cache: TRUE
warning: FALSE
---

```{r}
library(sf) #1.0-21
library(here) #1.0.1
library(janitor) #2.2.1
library(stars) #0.6-8
library(terra) #1.8-42
library(glmmTMB) #1.1.14
library(arcgislayers)
library(gtsummary)
library(gtExtras)
library(lmtest)
library(spdep)
library(kableExtra)

source(here('R', 'autocorrelation_tests.R'))
source(here('R','fit_agg.R'))
source(here('R','fit_disagg.R'))
source(here('R','adj_fit_agg.R'))
source(here('R', 'adj_fit_disagg.R'))
source(here("R", "spatial_join.R"))
source(here('R', 'rich_gini.R'))
set.seed(76)
sample = .8

habitats <- unique(birds_joined$habitat_type)
```


base 

```{r}
biodiv_area_search_agg <- birds_joined %>% 
    filter(survey_type %in% "Area Search")  %>% 
    gini_simpson()%>% 
    mutate(protection = ifelse(gap_sts %in% c(1,2), 
                               'Protected', 'Non-protected')) %>% 
    arrange(desc(observation_date))
  
  area_agg <- fit_agg(biodiv_area_search_agg)
  
  biodiv_point_count_agg <- birds_joined %>% 
    filter(survey_type %in% "Point Count") %>% 
    gini_simpson() %>%
    mutate(protection = ifelse(gap_sts %in% c(1,2), 
                               'Protected', 'Non-protected'))%>% 
    arrange(desc(observation_date))
  
  point_agg <- fit_agg(biodiv_point_count_agg)
  
  biodiv_area_search_disag <- birds_joined %>% 
    mutate(gap_sts = as.numeric(gap_sts)) %>% 
    filter(survey_type %in% "Area Search") %>% 
    gini_simpson()%>% 
    mutate(gap_sts = as.factor(gap_sts)) %>% 
    arrange(desc(observation_date))
  
  area_disag <- fit_disagg(biodiv_area_search_disag) 
  
  biodiv_point_count_disag <- birds_joined %>% 
    mutate(gap_sts = as.numeric(gap_sts)) %>% 
    filter(survey_type %in% "Point Count") %>% 
    gini_simpson() %>% 
    mutate(gap_sts = as.factor(gap_sts)) %>% 
    arrange(desc(observation_date))
  
 point_disag <- fit_disagg(biodiv_point_count_disag)
  
  
  birds_rich <- birds_joined %>%  
    gini_simpson() %>% 
    mutate(protection = ifelse(gap_sts %in% c(1,2), 
                               'Protected', 'Non-protected'))%>% 
    arrange(desc(observation_date))
  
  bird_summary <- fit_agg(birds_rich)
  

models <- list(
  point_disag  = point_disag,
  area_disag   = area_disag,
  point_agg    = point_agg,
  area_agg     = area_agg,
  bird_summary = bird_summary
)

spatial_temporal_tests <- list()

model_data_map <- list(
  point_disag  = biodiv_point_count_disag,
  area_disag   = biodiv_area_search_disag,
  point_agg    = biodiv_point_count_agg,
  area_agg     = biodiv_area_search_agg,
  bird_summary = birds_rich
)


spatial_temporal_tests <- run_spatial_temporal_tests(
  models         = models,
  model_data_map = model_data_map,
  habitats       = habitats
)

print(spatial_temporal_tests, n = 38)
```

Make into a Kable table for TM
```{r}
disag_table <- spatial_temporal_tests %>% 
  filter(grepl("_disag", model_name)) %>% 
  rename('Model Name' = model_name, 'Habitat' = habitat, 
         'Durbin Watson' = dw, "Moran's I Statistic" = moran_I,
         "Moran's I P-Value" = moran_p)

disag_table %>%
  kable(format = "html", digits = 3) %>% 
  kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive"),
    full_width = FALSE,
    position = "center",
    font_size = 14
  ) %>% 
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, color = "black", background = "#4392CE") %>%
  row_spec(seq(1, nrow(disag_table), 2), color = "black", background = "#74B444") %>%
  row_spec(seq(2, nrow(disag_table), 2), color = "black", background = "#A8D175")%>%
  save_kable(here::here('Outputs', 'figures', "disag_table.png"), zoom =3)

agg_table <- spatial_temporal_tests %>% 
  filter(grepl("_agg", model_name)) %>% 
  rename('Model Name' = model_name, 'Habitat' = habitat, 
         'Durbin Watson' = dw, "Moran's I Statistic" = moran_I,
         "Moran's I P-Value" = moran_p)

agg_table %>%
  kable(format = "html", digits = 3) %>% 
  kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive"),
    full_width = FALSE,
    position = "center",
    font_size = 14
  ) %>% 
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, color = "black", background = "#4392CE") %>%
  row_spec(seq(1, nrow(disag_table), 2), color = "black", background = "#74B444") %>%
  row_spec(seq(2, nrow(disag_table), 2), color = "black", background = "#A8D175")%>%
  save_kable(here::here('Outputs', 'figures', "agg_table.png"), zoom =3)
```


Gt Tables
```{r}
# Build a merged table (Area Search | Point Count) for each habitat
all_habitats <- union(names(area_agg), names(point_agg))

merged_by_habitat <- map(all_habitats, ~{
  area_model  <- area_agg[[.x]]
  point_model <- point_agg[[.x]]
  
  if (is.null(area_model) | is.null(point_model)) {
    message("Skipping ", .x, " — missing model in one survey type")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(
      tbl_regression(area_model),
      tbl_regression(point_model)
    ),
    tab_spanner = c("**Area Search**", "**Point Count**")
  )
}) %>%
  setNames(all_habitats) %>%
  compact()  # drops NULLs

# Stack all habitat tables with labels
aggregated_model_table <- tbl_stack(
  tbls = merged_by_habitat,
  group_header = names(merged_by_habitat)
)

pointblue   <- "#4495D1"
pointgreen1 <- "#74B444"
pointgreen2 <- "#A8D175"

agg_gt <- aggregated_model_table %>%
  as_gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Protection Status Effect on Biodiversity by Habitat Type"
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_fill(color = pointblue), cell_text(color = "black", weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_title()
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_fill(color = pointblue), cell_text(color = "black", weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_fill(color = pointblue), cell_text(color = "black", weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(everything())
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_fill(color = pointblue), cell_text(color = "black", weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = pointgreen1),
    locations = cells_body(rows = seq(1, nrow(aggregated_model_table$table_body), 2))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = pointgreen2),
    locations = cells_body(rows = seq(2, nrow(aggregated_model_table$table_body), 2))
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note("Note: Models fit using glmmTMB with beta family.")

gtsave(agg_gt, here::here("Outputs", "figures", "agg_gt_table.png"), zoom = 3)

## Disagg

# Build a merged table (Area Search | Point Count) for each habitat
all_habitats <- union(names(area_disag), names(point_disag))

merged_by_habitat <- map(all_habitats, ~{
  area_model  <- area_disag[[.x]]
  point_model <- point_disag[[.x]]
  
  if (is.null(area_model) | is.null(point_model)) {
    message("Skipping ", .x, " — missing model in one survey type")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(
      tbl_regression(area_model),
      tbl_regression(point_model)
    ),
    tab_spanner = c("**Area Search**", "**Point Count**")
  )
}) %>%
  setNames(all_habitats) %>%
  compact()  # drops NULLs

# Stack all habitat tables with labels
disaggregated_model_table <- tbl_stack(
  tbls = merged_by_habitat,
  group_header = names(merged_by_habitat)
)

pointblue   <- "#4495D1"
pointgreen1 <- "#74B444"
pointgreen2 <- "#A8D175"

disagg_gt <- disaggregated_model_table %>%
  as_gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "GAP Status Effect on Biodiversity by Habitat Type"
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_fill(color = pointblue), cell_text(color = "black", weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_title()
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_fill(color = pointblue), cell_text(color = "black", weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_fill(color = pointblue), cell_text(color = "black", weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(everything())
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_fill(color = pointblue), cell_text(color = "black", weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = pointgreen1),
    locations = cells_body(rows = seq(1, nrow(disaggregated_model_table$table_body), 2))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = pointgreen2),
    locations = cells_body(rows = seq(2, nrow(disaggregated_model_table$table_body), 2))
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note("Note: Models fit using glmmTMB with beta family.") 

gtsave(disagg_gt, here::here("Outputs", "figures", "disagg_gt_table.png"), zoom = 3)
```



Sample models
```{r}
set.seed(76)

sample_biodiv_area_search_agg <- birds_joined %>% 
    filter(survey_type %in% "Area Search")  %>% 
    gini_simpson()%>% 
    mutate(protection = ifelse(gap_sts %in% c(1,2), 
                               'Protected', 'Non-protected')) %>% 
    slice_sample(prop = sample)
  
  sample_area_agg <- fit_agg(sample_biodiv_area_search_agg, sample)
  
  sample_biodiv_point_count_agg <- birds_joined %>% 
    filter(survey_type %in% "Point Count") %>% 
    gini_simpson() %>%
    mutate(protection = ifelse(gap_sts %in% c(1,2), 
                               'Protected', 'Non-protected'))%>% 
    slice_sample(prop = sample)
  
  sample_point_agg <- fit_agg(sample_biodiv_point_count_agg, sample)
  
  sample_biodiv_area_search_disag <- birds_joined %>% 
    mutate(gap_sts = as.numeric(gap_sts)) %>% 
    filter(survey_type %in% "Area Search") %>% 
    gini_simpson() %>% 
    slice_sample(prop = sample)
  
  sample_area_disag <- fit_disagg(sample_biodiv_area_search_disag, sample) 
  
  sample_biodiv_point_count_disag <- birds_joined %>% 
    mutate(gap_sts = as.numeric(gap_sts)) %>% 
    filter(survey_type %in% "Point Count") %>% 
    gini_simpson() %>% 
    slice_sample(prop = sample)
  
 sample_point_disag <- fit_disagg(sample_biodiv_point_count_disag, sample)
  
  
  sample_birds_rich <- birds_joined %>%  
    gini_simpson() %>% 
    mutate(protection = ifelse(gap_sts %in% c(1,2), 
                               'Protected', 'Non-protected'))%>% 
    slice_sample(prop = sample)
  
  sample_bird_summary <- fit_agg(sample_birds_rich, sample)
  

models <- list(
  sample_point_disag  = sample_point_disag,
  sample_area_disag   = sample_area_disag,
  sample_point_agg    = sample_point_agg,
  sample_area_agg     = sample_area_agg,
  sample_bird_summary = sample_bird_summary
)

sample_spatial_temporal_tests <- list()

model_data_map <- list(
  sample_point_disag  = sample_biodiv_point_count_disag,
  sample_area_disag   = sample_biodiv_area_search_disag,
  sample_point_agg    = sample_biodiv_point_count_agg,
  sample_area_agg     = sample_biodiv_area_search_agg,
  sample_bird_summary = sample_birds_rich
)


sample_spatial_temporal_tests <- run_spatial_temporal_tests(
  models         = models,
  model_data_map = model_data_map,
  habitats       = habitats
)

print(sample_spatial_temporal_tests, n = 38)
```

Adjust models
```{r}
#|warning: FALSE
adj_area_agg <- adj_fit_agg(biodiv_area_search_agg, sample)

adj_point_agg <- adj_fit_agg(biodiv_point_count_agg, sample)

adj_area_disag <- adj_fit_disagg(biodiv_area_search_disag, sample) 

adj_point_disag <- adj_fit_disagg(biodiv_point_count_disag, sample)

adj_bird_summary <- adj_fit_agg(birds_rich, sample)

models <- list(
  adj_point_disag  = adj_point_disag,
  adj_area_disag   = adj_area_disag,
  adj_point_agg    = adj_point_agg,
  adj_area_agg     = adj_area_agg,
  adj_bird_summary = adj_bird_summary
)

adj_spatial_temporal_tests <- list()

model_data_map <- list(
  adj_point_disag  = biodiv_point_count_disag,
  adj_area_disag   = biodiv_area_search_disag,
  adj_point_agg    = biodiv_point_count_agg,
  adj_area_agg     = biodiv_area_search_agg,
  adj_bird_summary = birds_rich
)


adj_spatial_temporal_tests <- run_spatial_temporal_tests(
  models         = models,
  model_data_map = model_data_map,
  habitats       = habitats
)

print(adj_spatial_temporal_tests, n=38)
```

## GT Tables for adjusted models
```{r}
# Aggregated model table (protection)
all_habitats_agg <- union(names(adj_area_agg), names(adj_point_agg))

merged_adj_agg <- map(all_habitats_agg, ~{
  area_model  <- adj_area_agg[[.x]]
  point_model <- adj_point_agg[[.x]]
  
  if (is.null(area_model) | is.null(point_model)) {
    message("Skipping ", .x, " — missing model in one survey type")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(
      tbl_regression(area_model),
      tbl_regression(point_model)
    ),
    tab_spanner = c("**Area Search**", "**Point Count**")
  )
}) %>%
  setNames(all_habitats_agg) %>%
  compact()

adj_aggregated_model_table <- tbl_stack(
  tbls = merged_adj_agg,
  group_header = names(merged_adj_agg)
)

adj_agg_gt_table <- adj_aggregated_model_table %>%
  as_gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Protection Status Effect on Biodiversity by Habitat Type"
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_fill(color = pointblue), cell_text(color = "black", weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_title()
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_fill(color = pointblue), cell_text(color = "black", weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_fill(color = pointblue), cell_text(color = "black", weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(everything())
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_fill(color = pointblue), cell_text(color = "black", weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = pointgreen1),
    locations = cells_body(rows = seq(1, nrow(adj_aggregated_model_table$table_body), 2))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = pointgreen2),
    locations = cells_body(rows = seq(2, nrow(adj_aggregated_model_table$table_body), 2))
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note("Note: Models fit using glmmTMB with beta family.")

gtsave(adj_agg_gt_table, here::here("Outputs", "figures", "adj_agg_gt_table.png"), zoom = 3)

# Disaggregated model table (gap_sts)
all_habitats_disag <- union(names(adj_area_disag), names(adj_point_disag))

merged_adj_disag <- map(all_habitats_disag, ~{
  area_model  <- adj_area_disag[[.x]]
  point_model <- adj_point_disag[[.x]]
  
  if (is.null(area_model) | is.null(point_model)) {
    message("Skipping ", .x, " — missing model in one survey type")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(
      tbl_regression(area_model,  tidy_fun = broom.mixed::tidy),
      tbl_regression(point_model, tidy_fun = broom.mixed::tidy)
    ),
    tab_spanner = c("**Area Search**", "**Point Count**")
  )
}) %>%
  setNames(all_habitats_disag) %>%
  compact()

adj_disaggregated_model_table <- tbl_stack(
  tbls = merged_adj_disag,
  group_header = names(merged_adj_disag)
)

adj_disagg_gt_table <- adj_disaggregated_model_table %>%
  as_gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "GAP Status Effect on Biodiversity by Habitat Type"
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_fill(color = pointblue), cell_text(color = "black", weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_title()
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_fill(color = pointblue), cell_text(color = "black", weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_fill(color = pointblue), cell_text(color = "black", weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(everything())
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_fill(color = pointblue), cell_text(color = "black", weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = pointgreen1),
    locations = cells_body(rows = seq(1, nrow(adj_disaggregated_model_table$table_body), 2))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = pointgreen2),
    locations = cells_body(rows = seq(2, nrow(adj_disaggregated_model_table$table_body), 2))
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note("Note: Models fit using glmmTMB with beta family.")

gtsave(adj_disagg_gt_table, here::here("Outputs", "figures", "adj_disagg_gt_table.png"), zoom = 3)
```


Adjusted model and sampled 
```{r}
#|warning: FALSE
adj_sample_area_agg <- adj_fit_agg(sample_biodiv_area_search_agg, sample)

adj_sample_point_agg <- adj_fit_agg(sample_biodiv_point_count_agg, sample)

adj_sample_area_disag <- adj_fit_disagg(sample_biodiv_area_search_disag, sample)

adj_sample_point_disag <- adj_fit_disagg(sample_biodiv_point_count_disag, sample)

adj_sample_bird_summary <- adj_fit_agg(birds_rich, sample)

models <- list(
  adj_sample_point_disag  = adj_sample_point_disag,
  adj_sample_area_disag   = adj_sample_area_disag,
  adj_sample_point_agg    = adj_sample_point_agg,
  adj_sample_area_agg     = adj_sample_area_agg,
  adj_sample_bird_summary = adj_sample_bird_summary
)

adj_sample_spatial_temporal_tests <- list()

model_data_map <- list(
  adj_sample_point_disag  = sample_biodiv_point_count_disag,
  adj_sample_area_disag = sample_biodiv_area_search_disag,
  adj_sample_point_agg    = sample_biodiv_point_count_agg,
  adj_sample_area_agg     = sample_biodiv_area_search_agg,
  adj_sample_bird_summary = sample_birds_rich
)


adj_sample_spatial_temporal_tests <- run_spatial_temporal_tests(
  models         = models,
  model_data_map = model_data_map,
  habitats       = habitats
)

print(adj_sample_spatial_temporal_tests, n = 38)
```
